description: Composition Black round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, a ribbed neckline and graphic print Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash No bleaching, dry cleaning Iron with medium heat Do not iron on print Combining sport and style is adidas' forte. This t-shirt uses the popular “I love New york” theme, replacing it with the adidas logo, you can show off your love for the brand by wearing this print. Wear this classic style to any off-duty event to look your stylish best. Pair this tee with a classic denims and sports shoes to snazz up your style. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
